name: cataratasrh-backend
description: API REST para gestión de empleados - CataratasRH

scripts.docs: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('jsdoc README.md -c jsdoc.json', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) {} execSync('node ../inject_docs.js backend', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
